  "weights": {

  "active_set": ["R1.1", "R1.6", "RX.1", "RX.2", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "rationale": {
    "R1.1": "The gap statement and contribution claim exist but are buried in run-on clauses and excessive hedging ('which is something we believe represents a significant gap'); sharpening the thesis and making the contribution legible is central to improving a technical draft of this kind.",
    "R1.6": "Load-bearing: the prose is saturated with redundant hedges ('which seems to suggest', 'we think warrants', 'somewhat', 'going forward'), stacked relative clauses, and filler phrases that directly impair clarity and credibility—polishing these is the dominant interpretation of 'improve this draft.'"
  },
  "clarification_needed": false,
  "clarification_question": ""
}

rationale.R1.1: The gap statement and contribution claim exist but are buried in run-on clauses and excessive hedging ('which is something we believe represents a significant gap'); sharpening the thesis and making the contribution legible is central to improving a technical draft of this kind.
rationale.R1.6: Load-bearing: the prose is saturated with redundant hedges ('which seems to suggest', 'we think warrants', 'somewhat', 'going forward'), stacked relative clauses, and filler phrases that directly impair clarity and credibility—polishing these is the dominant interpretation of 'improve this draft.'
